templates.body:
METRIC REVIEW HOLD
Employee: _______________  KPI flagged: availability / time-on-task
Other KPIs: quality ___  resolution ___  CSAT ___

Action: observation 3-5 days before performance conversation.
No write-up until shadow-hub rule checked.

SHADOW HUB OBSERVATION · Day ___
Expert: _______________

Informal queue observed (Y/N)  Approx length: ___
Topics: _______________
Their primary metric during window: _______________
Peer quote (optional): _______________

1:1 REFRAME (not discipline)

"Your availability metric looks bad. I watched your week. You are running a help desk for the row. Quality scores make sense now.

That work matters but it is invisible on the dashboard and unfair to you. I want to log repeat questions with you and fix staffing or metrics. Will you do a one-week question capture sprint?"

REPEAT QUESTION LOG · Week of _______
Expert: _______________

| Question (short) | Asker role | Count est | Self-serve? | Tool/train idea |
|------------------|------------|-----------|-------------|-----------------|
|                  |            |           | Y/N         |                 |

Top 3 themes Friday: 1 ___ 2 ___ 3 ___

TOOLS/TRAINING BACKLOG
Theme: _______________  Hits: ___  Source expert: _______________

Deliverable: [ ] mf-tool candidate  [ ] template  [ ] training slice  [ ] FAQ
Owner: _______________  Target date: _______________
Credit expert in changelog: Y

ROLE / METRIC ADJUSTMENT PROPOSAL
Expert: _______________

Option: [ ] office hours block  [ ] tier-2 lane  [ ] reduced phone quota  [ ] SME stipend  [ ] rotate hub
Metric exemption: _______________
Staffing impact: _______________
Lead approval: _______________

STANDARD PERFORMANCE PATH
Observation found no shadow hub. Low availability = avoidance.

Next: documented coaching per handbook. Not mf-tpl-059 path.

TEAM NOTE

"[Name] holds official office hours [blocks] for [topic tier]. Queue there first before side pings. Helps metrics match reality."
